marketing_seeds: For HR payroll managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll files/month, manual timesheet entry causes late payroll processing. We convert timesheet entries into formatted payroll files instead of manual entry.
Manual timesheet entry leads to errors and delays in payroll processing.
